nasb.text: So they seized her, and when she arrived at the horses’ entrance of the king’s house, she was put to death there.

esv.text: So they laid hands on her; and she went through the horses’ entrance to the king’s house, and there she was put to death.

cnv.text: 於是他們下手拿住她；她回到王宮的馬門的時候，就在那裡被人殺死。

ccb.text: 他们抓住她，把她带到马匹进出王宫的入口，在那里杀了她。
